testcase.name: Registro com dados válidos

failure.message: Esperado 'Your account was created successfully', mas obtido 'Your account was created successfully. You are now logged in.'

testcase.failure: Failing step: Then devo ver a mensagem de sucesso "Your account was created successfully" ... failed in 0.115s Location: features/registersucess.feature:9 ASSERT FAILED: Esperado 'Your account was created successfully', mas obtido 'Your account was created successfully. You are now logged in.'
